summary: Iteration 53: Full verification of Comgate payment gateway (MOCK mode) for Event applications (PRO+). Backend: 13/13 pytest cases passed covering /initiate (happy path, unknown app, free-plan 402), /webhook/comgate (bad refId, missing refId, unknown payment), /mock/complete (paid+cancelled), /by-vs polling, VOP section 7.8 Comgate clause, and full E2E apply→initiate→mock/complete→auto-approved. Frontend: Playwright E2E confirmed apply flow → 'Zaplatit online' (pay-online-btn) → /payment/mock simulator (mock-pay-success/cancel visible) → /payment/return polling → 'Simulační režim'/'Platba úspěšná' reached. Admin SettingsPage has gateway-provider, gateway-merchant, gateway-secret testids.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/event-payments/initiate returns {ok, redirect_url:/payment/mock?..., transaction_id:MOCK-..., mode:'mock'} for Test Muzeum (PRO+, no merchant keys → MOCK mode auto-detected).
VERIFIED: Fresh FREE-plan tenant (registered via /api/auth/register with institution_type+country) triggers 402 on initiate — plan gate works before application lookup.

VERIFIED: /webhook/comgate correctly rejects malformed refId (400), missing refId (400), unknown payment (404). Signature-check path is bypassed only when tenant is in MOCK mode (documented in tests).
VERIFIED: /mock/complete with random institution_id returns 400/404 (only works when gateway resolves to MOCK mode + matching EventPayment exists).

VERIFIED: Full path new_apply → initiate → mock/complete(paid) → by-vs returns payment_status=paid, application_payment_status=paid, application_status=approved (auto_confirm_paid feature fires), amount=60 CZK, paid_at populated. Cancel path sets payment_status=failed.
VERIFIED: GET /api/legal/vop body contains 'comgate' and section '7.8' as specified.
VERIFIED: Apply response includes payment_settings.gateway_enabled=true when provider+mode configured; frontend conditionally shows pay-online-btn based on this flag.

VERIFIED (Playwright): /events/{institution_id} → Baby herna → select date → Pokračovat k přihlášce → fill name/email/phone/age + consent → Odeslat přihlášku → green [data-testid=pay-online-btn] visible → click → /payment/mock with vs/ref/trans/return params + mock-pay-success & mock-pay-cancel buttons present → click success → /payment/return → polling transitions to 'úspěšn' state.

CODE QUALITY: Gateway abstraction is clean — factory.py mode detection (empty→MOCK, TEST_-prefix→TEST, else→LIVE) matches spec. ComgateGateway.parse_webhook enforces merchant+secret match only when mode != MOCK AND _is_configured() — correct defensive behaviour for placeholder-keys environments.

MINOR OBSERVATION: In MOCK mode the webhook endpoint does NOT validate merchant/secret, so any attacker could POST refId=<valid_uuid> to force a payment to 'paid' on mock-configured tenants. For production this is harmless because production will have real keys and the signature check will engage. Suggest adding an explicit 400 refusal of /webhook/comgate when mode==MOCK (force integrators to use /mock/complete) as a hardening step.

MINOR OBSERVATION: initiate endpoint raises 402 via _get_institution_and_check BEFORE checking if the application exists; this leaks plan status for any institution_id. Not a security issue but worth documenting.
seed_data_creation: Registered transient TEST_FreePlan_* institutions via /api/auth/register to exercise 402 rejection; submitted multiple TEST_E2E applications against Baby herna (all paid/failed in MOCK mode).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comgate MOCK flow fully green. Public apply endpoint is POST /api/events/public/{institution_id}/apply (ApplicationCreate schema: event_id, event_date_id, applicant_name, applicant_email, applicant_data dict, note). /api/auth/register requires institution_type + country (both CZ strings). Frontend public events route is /events/{institutionId}. Signup response shape: {token, user:{institution_id, ...}, institution_name}. When Comgate LIVE keys are configured, also retest /webhook/comgate signature rejection (currently untested because MOCK mode bypasses it).
